ddls:
CREATE TABLE "meter_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meter reading */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reading was taken */,
  "watts" REAL /* Electricity consumption in watts */,
  "volts" REAL /* Voltage reading */,
  "amps" REAL /* Current in amps */,
  "pf" REAL /* Power factor */,
  "mark" TEXT /* Identifier for the meter or sensor */,
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meter */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the power supply */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Ambient temperature at the time of reading */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Ambient humidity at the time of reading */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reading */,
  "alert" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if an alert was raised for this reading */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments related to the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meter_readings_meter_id FOREIGN KEY ("meter_id") REFERENCES meters ("meter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meter_readings_mark FOREIGN KEY ("mark") REFERENCES meters ("meter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meters" (
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meter */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the meter is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the meter was installed */,
  "meter_type" TEXT /* Type of meter (e.g., smart meter, sensor) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the meter or sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the meter or sensor */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the meter or sensor */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the meter's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the meter's location */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the meter (e.g., utility company, customer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consumption_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumption pattern */,
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meter associated with the pattern */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the pattern */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the pattern */,
  "average_watts" REAL /* Average electricity consumption during the pattern */,
  "peak_watts" REAL /* Peak electricity consumption during the pattern */,
  "min_watts" REAL /* Minimum electricity consumption during the pattern */,
  "max_watts" REAL /* Maximum electricity consumption during the pattern */,
  "total_consumption" REAL /* Total electricity consumed during the pattern */,
  "pattern_type" TEXT /* Type of pattern (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments related to the pattern */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumption_patterns_meter_id FOREIGN KEY ("meter_id") REFERENCES meters ("meter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, maintenance, customer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
